系统随机发布任务，只要完成系统任务以及购买物品就可以获得美味点，美味点可以兑换各种奖励。
校门口卖烤鸭腿，夜市摆摊卖牛排，公园里的胡辣汤。
一个又一个食物吸引着所有人，包括同校的学姐们。
“卧槽！我卖鸭腿的小学弟呢？怎么人没了”
“我从早上排到晚上，牛排小哥呢？我排了十几个小时啊！就为了这一口没了！”
“我的小学弟怎么又跑了？人那？”
等到林凡再次见到这些学姐的时候，发现她们看向自己的眼神都快拉丝了。
“学姐请自重，我只是个厨子！倒追我也不行啊喂！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b57c6af5e15e0bc163bf156bbe0aa188","author":"轩辕张","author_id":"","book_id":"7562786291792759870","book_name":"美食摊随缘出摊，校花倒追疯了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7562786469983568446","read_count":"47757","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"708169"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.5","serial_count":"323","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,美食,校花","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4c2cb669e9fb08054b7a095b5f1a71e9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365599&x-signature=cTUYACD6dZk3eva2S%2FigpTixFcI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3502398403519312","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"74"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322201319E4939A6D9D864EBD727C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_dur
